text_source: {c5}Combat Tutorial{c-1} added to the Glossary.
Well looky here. Looks like we've got a fresh\n
idiot, waltzing right in.
Huh. These next guys seem pretty sure of\n
themselves, but they don't look so tough...
Hah! Talk big all you want. We've got a trump card\n
up our sleeve, see?
A trump card...? Gah!? You've trained gigiri to\n
fight for you...!? Are you insane!?
Hahaha! What do you think? Who's "not so tough"\n
now!? There's no way we're going to los--\n
GYAARGH!!
...Y'know, for a dream, this is weirdly realistic.\n
Whatever... I doubt I can get around this one.
Rrrgh, how!? My plan was flawless...
Don't think you've won just yet!
You may have defeated me, but after this, there\n
will surely be a second gigiri! And a third!\n
And a fourth!
Holy shit, how many of these are gonna show up!?\n
Don't jinx it... No more nasty surprises, please...
